hero.title: Reliable Telecommunication Infrastructure Partner
hero.subtitle: Delivering high-quality fiber optic and network infrastructure solutions across Batam, with a strong commitment to precision, reliability, and engineering excellence. We strive to build long-term partnerships by ensuring every project is executed with accuracy, efficiency, and the highest industry standards.

about.title: Building the Backbone of Modern Connectivity
about.description: PT. ARIF MANDIRI is a trusted general contractor specializing in telecommunication infrastructure, fiber optic installation, and network solutions. Established in 2019 and headquartered in Batam, we partner with leading telecom and infrastructure companies to deliver reliable, future-ready networks.

features.f1: Specialized in fiber optic & telecom infrastructure
features.f2: Skilled engineering and field operation teams
features.f3: Proven delivery for enterprise & government clients

director.title: A Message From Our Director
director.p1: We are committed to delivering excellence in every project. Our goal is to provide high-quality and reliable telecommunication solutions to support long-term infrastructure growth across Batam.
director.quote: Building strong connections today for a better, more reliable, and more connected tomorrow. We are dedicated to providing quality solutions that empower growth and innovation.
director.name: Judi Harianto

legal.title: Certifications & Legal Documents
legal.subtitle: Ensuring compliance, credibility, and trusted operational standards. We pave the way for sustainable growth through unwavering integrity.

foundation.title: Vision, Mission & Goal
foundation.subtitle: The core principles that guide us through every project we undertake.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To support customers and meet their needs effectively.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: To be competitive, reliable, and responsive.

goal.title: Goal
goal.desc: To complete projects on time and ensure customer satisfaction.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A comprehensive range of telecommunication and network infrastructure services tailored for corporate reliability.

fo_install.title: Fiber Optic Installation
fo_install.desc: Professional deployment of fiber optic cables for high-speed, long-distance backbone networks.

fo_maintenance.title: Fiber Optic Maintenance
fo_maintenance.desc: Ongoing inspection, fusion splicing, and repair services to keep your network running without interruption.

cctv.title: CCTV Systems
cctv.desc: Integrated CCTV surveillance design and installation for offices, project sites, and facilities.

pabx.title: PABX Installation
pabx.desc: Reliable PABX telephone systems customized for businesses of any scale and complexity.

lan.title: LAN Networking
lan.desc: Structured LAN cabling and configuration for stable, secure office connectivity.

it_telecom.title: IT & Telecom Infrastructure
it_telecom.desc: End-to-end consulting, deployment, and support for IT and telecommunication infrastructure.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: A glimpse of recent work completed for our corporate and infrastructure partners.
projects.defaultDesc: Completed with precision engineering and on-schedule execution.

activities.title: Activity Gallery
activities.subtitle: Three key field activities that drive the successful implementation of our projects.

a1.title: Cable Pulling
a1.desc: Precision pulling of fiber optic and copper cables through pipes, trenches, and conduits.

a2.title: HDPE Installation
a2.desc: Civil works and underground HDPE pipe installation forming the foundation of network pathways.

a3.title: Fiber Optic Splicing
a3.desc: Expert fusion splicing and termination ensuring low-loss, durable network connections.

clients.title: Our Valued Clients
clients.subtitle: Partnering with industry leaders across telecommunications, energy, and government sectors.

contact.title: Let's Build Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Reach out and our team will respond within one business day.

toast.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.desc: A trusted general contractor for fiber optic, networking, and IT infrastructure across Batam. Delivering reliable solutions with precision and consistency.
footer.tagline: Engineered for reliability, built for performance.
